title: The Fun Pack [16x]
description: this is a pvp and and bedwars pack.
body:
**_This pack improves your PvP performance, boosts your FPS and is great fun. The pack is currently in beta and new features will be added soon, such as the anchor loading texture and particles. By the way, the pack also includes all types of wool and fireballs, so you can play BedWars with this great pack! If you have any content suggestions for the pack, let me know and maybe they will be added. (:_**

Installation guide: The pack comes in a .zip file. You just have to drag the pack into your .minecraft/resourcepacks folder and start the game. Then go to Options > Resource Packs and activate it by clicking on the arrow symbol on the left. The pack should now appear on the right and you can click "Done". The sky should now appear in your Minecraft world.

What if the sky does not appear? You might have to set your render distance higher and enable custom sky in your video settings. If the sky still doesn't show up, you may need to use a skybox render engine. I used the mod Skyboxify. Important! Don't use Optifine because the pack isn't made for it; use Skyboxify instead.

If you have any issues, let me know and I will try to fix them.
